intro.de: Main titles and identity for a nocturnal psychological thriller.
intro.en: Main titles and identity for a nocturnal psychological thriller.

de: Nocturne needed a title sequence that felt like memory under pressure — legible, then not.
Type dissolves into grain and reforms; the mark is a single serif N that behaves like a light source moving behind fog.
en: Nocturne needed a title sequence that felt like memory under pressure — legible, then not.
Type dissolves into grain and reforms; the mark is a single serif N that behaves like a light source moving behind fog.
